inventory_object_definition.name: encoding_inventory_I
inventory_object_definition.high_level_form: I = {E_c} over concepts c, grouped by family patches and augmented by attribute axes, relation templates, and stress fields
inventory_object_definition.entry_form: E_c = (f_c, z_c, delta_c, N_same(c), N_cross(c), A_c, R_c, S_c)

entry_fields.z_c: concept state on the shared object atlas
entry_fields.S_c: stress profile: novelty pressure, retention risk, relation-lift capacity

layered_structure.family_patch_layer: shared family basis and local patch radius
layered_structure.concept_entry_layer: concept-specific family offset and neighbor structure
layered_structure.attribute_axis_layer: reusable local directions such as round, elongated, domestic, persistent
layered_structure.relation_template_layer: same-family, cross-family, and bridge-role style relational organization
layered_structure.stress_field_layer: dynamic profile over each concept entry

candidate_equations.inventory_viability_rule: E_c is dynamically admissible only if S_c stays inside the family-conditioned admissible region induced by A and M_feas

mathematical_principles.low_rank_family_patches: family patches behave like low-rank local charts
mathematical_principles.sparse_concept_offsets: concept identity is carried by relatively small family-centered offsets
mathematical_principles.reusable_attribute_directions: attributes act like local basis directions attached to family patches
mathematical_principles.restricted_relation_lifts: relations should lift from concept entries without breaking family-local geometry
mathematical_principles.stress_augmented_inventory: inventory becomes dynamic once each concept entry carries a stress field

verdict.core_answer: The encoding inventory can now be formalized as a layered mathematical object: family patch plus concept entry plus attribute axes plus relation templates plus stress fields.
verdict.next_theory_target: connect this inventory object to family-conditioned operators and restricted overlap maps so the inventory directly parameterizes A and M_feas
